mapper.insert: insert into batch_qr_code_stat (phone, scan_count, download_count, register_count, stat_date) values (#{phone}, 1, 0, 0, curdate()) on duplicate key update scan_count = scan_count + 1
insert into batch_qr_code_stat (phone, scan_count, download_count, register_count, stat_date) values (#{phone}, 0, 1, 0, curdate()) on duplicate key update download_count = download_count + 1
insert into batch_qr_code_stat (phone, scan_count, download_count, register_count, stat_date) values (#{phone}, 0, 0, 1, curdate()) on duplicate key update register_count = register_count + 1
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(scan_count), 0) as scanCount, ifnull(sum(download_count), 0) as downloadCount, ifnull(sum(register_count), 0) as registerCount from batch_qr_code_stat where phone = #{phone}
